description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 65% cotton, 45% polyester, softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, graphic print with glitter and nike Swoosh on the front, brand tab at the hemline, engineered with Dri-Fit technologyFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in lukewarm water with like colours at 40 degree C Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron on design Dry cleanable Whether you're playing tennis or hanging out with your friends, this black t-shirt from nike will get you noticed. The eye-catching print with glitter adds zing to the lovely tee, while it salutes the energetic game of tennis. Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it will wick away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, on and off the court. Team it with tracks, shorts or jeans to look awesome.
